route_sections.launch_value: Makes backend provenance visible before runtime topology details.

route_sections.launch_value: Keeps backend proof linked with UI and database conversion routes.

route_sections.launch_value: Shows the actual backend source areas without executing functions.

route_sections.launch_value: Preserves operations workflows as readable DX-WWW route sections.

route_sections.label: Function execution and deployment boundary

route_sections.label: Backend operations split surface
route_sections.launch_value: Keeps backend inventory, runtime notes, and source tables readable in Web Preview.

responsive_constraints: Backend operation lanes stack cleanly in narrow Zed preview.
Runtime blockers remain adjacent to the source sections they constrain.
Navigation stays visible before long topology notes.
accessibility_notes: Convex logo has descriptive alt text.
Blocked runtime work is listed as visible text.
Active route state is visible in route navigation.

real: Functions, data, logs, files, and runtime topology source paths are recorded.
Copied logo and FSL notice are preserved.
partial: Realtime and function surfaces are represented structurally until reviewed runtime adapters exist.
blocked: No realtime socket, function execution, deployment write, or license-sensitive server reuse was performed.
